stories.headline: Food prices have fallen – but inflation expected to rise from here
stories.description: June's fall in inflation will be welcomed by the new prime minister but analysts warn the fall is temporary.

stories.headline: Will your job be replaced by AI? Here are the roles most affected
stories.description: AI companies claim their tools replace human labour, but our charts show the reality.

stories.headline: Ukrainian drones hit more sites of Russian online retailer Wildberries
stories.description: Logistics hubs belonging to Wildberries in the Krasnodar and Stavropol regions were struck overnight.

stories.headline: Iran, Gulf hit as Hormuz, Bab al-Mandeb close: What’s the latest?
stories.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth tells US senators that the war has cost the US $37.5bn so far.

stories.headline: Iran launches missiles at Jordan
stories.description: Jordan’s military intercepted four missiles over the port city of Aqaba.
